THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, JOE CAMPBELL, DONNA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 SOUTH VAN NESS AVE #139C, S.F. $2,191.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,191.00, STAYED UNTIL APR-07-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, 9AM. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES. MUTUAL WAIVER OF ALL CLAIMS, INCL 1542CC. IF DEFTS VACATE ON OR BEFORE APR 7, 1998 9AM, DEFTS ENTITLED TO SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT OR AN EX PARTE APPL FOR ORDER VACATE JUDGMENT AND DISM CASE W/PREJUDICE.
